_meta.description: Drive disc set registry: 2-piece passive bonuses (auto-applied when >= 2 pieces are equipped) and 4-piece conditional effects (stack count asked at runtime). Add new sets here as data.
_meta.conventions: Stat names and fractions match discs.json, plus 'Combat ATK%': an in-combat ATK buff that MULTIPLIES final (panel) ATK instead of scaling base ATK - measured in-game 2026-07-02 (see DOCS/sources.md). bonus_2pc is unconditional (shows on the in-game stat sheet). bonus_4pc, when present, is a stacking conditional stat: total = per_stack x active stacks (0..max_stacks), asked at runtime; 4 pieces always include the 2-piece bonus too. bonus_4pc_dmg is a list of skill-type-conditional DMG% bonuses ({skill_tag, value}) applied automatically when the calculated hit's damage type matches - tag keys come from constants.json 'skill_tags'. RAMP-UP convention (2026-07-04): a 4pc/squad_4pc effect with 'auto': true defaults to max in the front end (the user needn't toggle it) because it ramps up early and holds through a rotation - the anomaly range's unbuffed floor (70-100%) covers the ramp/uptime; still overridable; situational effects leave auto off. 'bonus_4pc_auto_dmg' is an always-assumed-on general DMG% part of the 4pc (e.g. Wuthering Salon's +18% on Windswept), auto-applied to the ON-FIELD wearer via the dilutable kit-DMG% path (so the floor covers its ramp). Reserve manual 'Extra %' inputs for EXTERNAL buffs only (season / boss-encounter).

bonus_4pc.note: Basic Attack / Dodge Counter / EX Special crits each grant +9% ATK for 6s - one stack per skill type, up to 3 concurrent. Scales PANEL ATK (measured: +300/+599 on a 3330 panel).

BRANCH_BLADE_SONG.name: Branch & Blade Song
BRANCH_BLADE_SONG.notes: 4-piece exists in-game (CRIT DMG +30% while Anomaly Mastery >= 115; CRIT Rate +12% on squad Freeze/Shatter) but is not modeled yet — only the 2-piece is used for now.

bonus_4pc.note: Entering combat or switching in, the user's ATK increases by 25% for 10s. Can trigger once every 20s. Combat ATK% (panel-multiplying) by analogy with Woodpecker/Puffer (both confirmed in-game) - not directly measured.

SHOCKSTAR_DISCO.name: Shockstar Disco
SHOCKSTAR_DISCO.notes: Stunner set, verified 2026-07-03 (Game8). Neither piece affects the damage formula: 2pc Impact +6% and 4pc Daze +20% (Basic/Dash/Dodge Counter) speed up stuns only - relevance convention: documented, nothing modeled.

KING_OF_THE_SUMMIT.name: King of the Summit

squad_4pc.note: Yunkui Summit set. Stun wearer's EX Special / Chain Attack: ALL squad members' CRIT DMG +15% for 15s (1 stack); +15% more while the wearer's CRIT Rate >= 50% (2 stacks). Same-name passives don't stack. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8).

KING_OF_THE_SUMMIT.notes: 2pc Daze +6% affects buildup only (not modeled). The 4pc is squad-facing - ideal on Dialyn.

YUNKUI_TALES.name: Yunkui Tales

bonus_4pc.note: Wearer's EX Special / Chain Attack / Ultimate grants +4% CRIT Rate for 15s (refreshing), stacking to 3; AT 3 STACKS additionally Sheer DMG +10% (dedicated Sheer bracket). RAMP-UP in a Rupture rotation (EX/Ult spam) - auto-applied at max stacks; the Sheer part lands only at 3. CALIBRATED in-game 2026-07-10 (Rupture calibration #2: x1.100 on the swing total exactly, multiplicatively SEPARATE from the DMG% bracket).

YUNKUI_TALES.notes: 2pc HP +10% feeds Yixuan's HP->Sheer Force conversion. 4pc CRIT stacks + the at-3-stacks Sheer DMG +10% both modeled; the GO datamine routes the Sheer part as team-facing - modeled self-only until a squad test says otherwise.

SWING_JAZZ.name: Swing Jazz

squad_4pc.note: Launching a Chain Attack or Ultimate increases ALL squad members' DMG by 15% for 12s. Toggle when the wearer (usually a support) has triggered it. Verified 2026-07-03 (Game8).

SWING_JAZZ.notes: 2pc Energy Regen has no damage effect. The 4pc is squad-facing: it buffs the on-field agent even when worn by an off-field support.

PROTO_PUNK.name: Proto Punk

squad_4pc.note: When any squad member triggers a Defensive or Evasive Assist: all squad members deal +15% DMG for 10s (same-name effects don't stack). Verified 2026-07-03 (zzz.gg).

PROTO_PUNK.notes: 2pc Shield effect has no damage effect. Squad-facing 4pc.

ASTRAL_VOICE.name: Astral Voice

squad_4pc.note: Quick Assist entries grant Astral stacks (max 3, 15s): the character entering via Quick Assist deals +8% DMG per stack. Set stacks for the ON-FIELD agent's entry. Verified 2026-07-03 (zzz.gg).

ASTRAL_VOICE.notes: Squad-facing 4pc; the 2pc ATK% applies to the WEARER only (irrelevant when worn by an off-field support).

FANGED_METAL.name: Fanged Metal

bonus_4pc.note: Whenever a squad member inflicts Assault: the equipper deals +35% DMG to the target for 12s. Generic DMG% (zenless-optimizer brackets it with the ordinary DMG% bonuses) - RAMP-UP, effectively always up after the first Assault, so auto-applied (range's floor covers the ramp).

FANGED_METAL.notes: Physical anomaly set (added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine). 2pc is PHYSICAL DMG +10% - the schema's 2pc stats aren't element-gated, so only select this set on Physical agents (assume-it-matches, like Wuthering Salon). Disorder-mode caveat: the calculator only applies build DMG% when the dealt element matches the attacker's attribute, so the 4pc is dropped from Disorder bursts dealt as another element - enter it manually there if active.

FREEDOM_BLUES.name: Freedom Blues
FREEDOM_BLUES.notes: Anomaly set (added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine). Only the 2pc affects the damage formula. 4pc: EX Special hits reduce the target's Anomaly Buildup RES to the equipper's attribute by 20% for 8s (same-attribute effects don't stack) - buildup SPEED only, never proc damage: documented, not modeled (Shockstar convention).

MOONLIGHT_LULLABY.name: Moonlight Lullaby

squad_4pc.note: When the equipper is a SUPPORT character and uses an EX Special / Ultimate: ALL squad members' DMG +18% for 25s (repeated triggers refresh; same-name passives don't stack). Ideal on Yuzuha. RAMP-UP - auto-applied when the support wears it.

MOONLIGHT_LULLABY.notes: Support set (added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine). 2pc Energy Regen has no direct damage effect - but on Velina it feeds her core passive: include it in the 'initial_energy_regen' panel value you enter. Squad-facing 4pc, Swing Jazz convention (support wearer only - the schema doesn't enforce the specialty condition; the user checks it).

CHAOS_JAZZ.name: Chaos Jazz

bonus_4pc.note: Fire DMG and Electric DMG +15%, always active - answer yes on Fire/Electric agents (Evelyn, Yanagi), no on anyone else (the schema's stats aren't element-gated; assume-it-matches).

CHAOS_JAZZ.notes: Fire/Electric anomaly set (added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine). The 4pc's second part - off-field EX Special and Assist Attack DMG +20% (persisting 5s after switch-in, once per 7.5s) - is a separate skill-gated conditional the single-4pc-slot schema can't hold: enter 20 as external DMG% on qualifying hits.

THUNDER_METAL.name: Thunder Metal

bonus_4pc.note: While an enemy in combat is Shocked: the equipper's ATK +28% (Combat ATK%, panel-multiplying). RAMP-UP - a Shocked enemy comes up quickly in an Electric team, so auto-applied (the range covers uptime).

THUNDER_METAL.notes: Electric anomaly/attack set (added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine). 2pc is ELECTRIC DMG +10% - the schema's 2pc stats aren't element-gated, so only select this set on Electric agents (assume-it-matches, like Wuthering Salon).

PHAETHONS_MELODY.name: Phaethon's Melody

bonus_4pc.note: When ANY squad member uses an EX Special Attack: the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency +45 for 8s. RAMP-UP in a team, auto-applied.

PHAETHONS_MELODY.notes: Ether anomaly set (Vivian; added 2026-07-04, zenless-optimizer datamine). 2pc AM +8% affects BUILDUP speed only, not proc damage (tracked, not in the damage formula). 4pc's second part - 'if a teammate (NOT the equipper) uses the EX Special, equipper Ether DMG +25%' - is modeled as bonus_4pc_auto_dmg 0.25 (general DMG% on the ether wearer; assume-it-matches; RAMP-UP, the range covers uptime) but NEEDS_TEAMMATE: it can't fire SOLO (no teammate to use EX), so it's skipped when there are no supports. Confirmed in-game 2026-07-05 (solo Vivian Abloom matched to 1 unit once this was removed - see sources.md). Only equip on Ether agents.

WUTHERING_SALON.name: Wuthering Salon

bonus_4pc.note: Using an EX Special Attack grants +25 Anomaly Proficiency for 40s, stacking to 2 (repeated triggers refresh) - RAMP-UP, effectively always max in an anomaly rotation, so auto-applied at max (the anomaly range's unbuffed floor covers the ramp).

WUTHERING_SALON.notes: Velina's primary set (added 2026-07-03, zenless-optimizer datamine). 2pc is WIND DMG +10% - the schema's 2pc stats aren't element-gated, so only equip/select this set on Wind agents (assume-it-matches, like legacy Attribute DMG% discs). The 4pc's second part - 'when the equipper triggers Windswept, their DMG +18% for 40s' - is a RAMP-UP buff (off during the first Windswept's buildup, on after): modeled as 'bonus_4pc_auto_dmg' 0.18, AUTO-applied to the wearer via the dilutable kit-DMG% path (the range's unbuffed floor covers the ramp/falloff). Confirmed in-game 2026-07-04 (calibration #5: ~+9% snapshot-effective on an early Windswept, matching to 0.1%).

bonus_4pc.note: Launching an Ultimate increases the user's ATK by 15% for 12s. Combat ATK% (panel-multiplying) CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-02 (Nekomata validation #2: crit scaled exactly x1.15).

bonus_4pc_dmg.note: Ultimate DMG +20% - applies automatically when the calculated hit's damage type is Ultimate.
